mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, friend_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM friendships WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND friend_user_id = #{friendUserId} AND status = #{status} LIMIT 1
SELECT id, user_id, friend_user_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM friendships WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} ORDER BY updated_at DESC
